title: astragalus gummifer subsp. tournefortii
intro: Astragalus gummifer subsp. tournefortii, also known as Tragacanth, is a type of desert plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to soothe and protect the mucous membranes, making it an effective treatment for digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Astragalus gummifer subsp. tournefortii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system. This plant is often used in herbal preparations such as capsules, teas, and topical creams, and is also used as an ingredient in some cosmetics and pharmaceutical products.
